variants: Quetzal Tapia is a passionate ethnomusicologist affiliated with the Whispering Fern Folklorists. With mentorship from Jawad Zamani, Quetzal has cultivated a deep understanding of musical traditions across cultures. Their work is supported by the Heathen Reel Grants, ensuring that Quetzal can continue their research and projects without financial strain. Additionally, Quetzal holds a Mana Stream Pilot Card, which complements their interest in music and sound within diverse environments. This unique combination of expertise and affiliation has solidified Quetzal's reputation in the field of ethnomusicology.

This expertise allows them to bridge various forms of musical expression in their work.
